free_text: Large angle scattering of alpha-particles from S-32.
Sulphur targets were prepared using the electron beam
evaporation technique with natural ZnS as the target
material.  As a target a layer of ZnS with 200-600
nanometers thickness was sandwiched between two gold
layers with similar thicknesses of 6-10 nanometers on a
carbon backing of 40 mug/cm**2.  Thicknesses of gold
layers were selected such that the statistics of
sulphur scattering alpha-particles to that of gold
would be similar in the energy range where the
.The uncertainty is shown by authors on figure
A 200-nanometers thick silicon target was used.
A 600-nanometers thick silicon target was used.
